name: Mistral AI SDK, TanStack Router hit in npm software supply chain
snippet: Hundreds of software packages are affected, once again threatening enterprise credentials on coders' machines.

name: Xinference allegedly hacked by TeamPCP, Malicious Package In PyPi
snippet: Xinference hit by TeamPCP supply chain attack. Malicious PyPI versions v2.6.0–2.6.2 exfiltrate secrets and credentials.

name: TanStack, Mistral AI, UiPath Hit in Fresh Supply Chain Attack
snippet: Over 170 TanStack, Mistral AI, OpenSearch, UiPath, and other packages were affected in a new Mini Shai-Hulud supply chain attack.

name: New Supply Chain Malware Operation Hits npm and PyPI
snippet: Supply chain attack infects 16 GlueStack npm packages used by 1M weekly users, enabling malware that steals data and controls systems.
